title: Ross Stores (ROST) on Track With Expansion Plan, Opens 29 Stores
text: As part of the store-expansion efforts, Ross Stores (ROST) opens 21 Ross Dress for Less and eight dd's DISCOUNTS stores in 12 states.

title: Ross Stores opens 29 stores in June and July
text: Ross Stores Inc. ROST, +2.30% said Monday that it opened 29 stores in June and July: 21 Ross Dress for Less locations and eight dd's Discounts. The new locations are part of the company's plan to open 100 locations in 2022.

title: Do Not Buy Ross Stores Stock Just Because It's on Sale
text: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) has struggled on the charts of late, down 38.8% year-over-year.

title: 7 Nasdaq Stocks to Sell Now
text: If July's market gains begin to wither away, investors would be wise to consider unloading these seven Nasdaq stocks to sell. The post 7 Nasdaq Stocks to Sell Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Ross Stores: People Dress For Less In Times Of Low Consumer Confidence
text: Ross Stores performed poorly in the first quarter of 2022, with sales declining and margins contracting. The share price of ROST has also substantially declined in the first half of the year; however, the firm appears to remain overvalued compared to the consumer discretionary sector median.

title: Why These Retailers' Stocks Fell This Week
text: Investors are worried about slowing demand and rising inventory levels.
